menuSection.heading: The Menu
menuSection.note:
All pizzas are 12". Kids pizzas are 9".
Gluten-free base available +$3.
Please advise of any allergies.

about.heading: A little about us
paragraphs: Paradiso is a small Titirangi pizza spot making pizza, cannoli and tiramisu for the neighbourhood.
We keep the menu tight: good dough, San Marzano tomato, fior di latte, a hot oven and a few house-made sweets for after.
We opened in 2026 and have been lucky to be backed by Titirangi locals from day one.
